ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the product image */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the product is featured */,
  "brand" TEXT /* The brand of the product */,
  "material" TEXT /* The material(s) the product is made of */,
  "color" TEXT /* The color of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* The size of the product */,
  "gender" TEXT /* The gender the product is intended for (e.g., Men, Women) */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* The type of product (e.g., Hat, Tie, Cufflinks) */,
  "ean" TEXT /* The European Article Number (EAN) for the product */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the product was added to the catalog */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the category was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the category was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id", "category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "restock_threshold" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity for restocking */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date of the last restock */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* The batch number for the inventory */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* The expiry date of the batch (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the inventory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the inventory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* ID of the billing address for the order */,
  "order_total" TEXT /* Total amount of the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the order was placed */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the order was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price at which the product was sold */,
  "discounted_price" TEXT /* Price of the product after any discounts */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the order item was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the order item was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points accumulated by the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "birthdate" TEXT /* Birthdate of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the customer account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the order */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  "transaction_id" TEXT /* Transaction ID from the payment processor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the payment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discounts" (
  "discount_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discount */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "discount_percentage" TEXT /* Percentage discount on the product */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the discount */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the discount */,
  "minimum_purchase_amount" TEXT /* Minimum purchase amount required to apply the discount */,
  "maximum_discount_amount" TEXT /* Maximum discount amount that can be applied */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the discount was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the discount was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discount_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discounts_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the customer */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment left by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  "is_verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is from a verified purchase */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_votes" INTEGER /* The number of times the review has been marked as unhelpful */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the review was written */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the review was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the product */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the additional product image */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date when the image was uploaded */,
  "alt_text" TEXT /* Alternative text for the image for accessibility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The date and time the image was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
